title: Czech Official Kapitola API Response
description: Schema for the official /api/kapitola endpoint response — a flat array of budget chapter objects.

id.description: State-assigned chapter identifier (may change due to political renumbering).

name.description: Full English name of the ministry or government body.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this chapter became active.

endDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this chapter expired, or '9999-12-31' if still active.

expired.description: True when the chapter has been dissolved or merged.
